narrative:
Monroe Township has 1,894 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.7 percentage points.
